title: Compulsory Fields

posts.author: Susana (Susana)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello,

I do not think this has been discussed before even though I find it really basic. We would need to make certain fields or columns to be filled compulsory, so there is no gaps of information.
I know Conditional Status Change has been released for Enterprise plans on CRM but I find it really basic for all Monday products and it only applies to Status changes.

Our use case: We have an automation that is triggered whenever the status changes to “Sent”. This automation sends an email to someone, but it won’t work if this field is empty, obviously, so we would need to have this field as compulsory.

I can think of many other examples!
Also, I haven’t been able to find this feature in the apps as well.

posts.author: Ben_R (Ben Rabinovich)
posts.cookedHtml: Absolutely! This is such a simple change that would encourage adherence to processes so quickly!

posts.author: ForTheW (Nathan Erickson)
posts.cookedHtml:
Agree! This is something we’ve requested of Monday since day 1 of opening our account.

It’s the most basic PM item not offered by them, IMO.
